description: A wide-angle panoramic photograph depicts an extensive port or harbor complex under an overcast sky. In the foreground, calm, greyish-green water fills the basin. Along the left side, a long concrete pier is lined with multiple long, low-rise industrial buildings or warehouses with grey roofs. Further along this pier, tall white silos and blue industrial cranes are visible. Towards the center, a large, round, weathered concrete building stands prominently near the water, with two smaller boats (one red and white, one yellow) docked nearby. The right side of the image features another pier with two large white passenger or ferry boats, one with a blue stripe, docked alongside a building with a dark blue/grey roof. At the end of this pier, a small white lighthouse-like structure with a green top marks the entrance to an open water channel. Across the channel, an urban landscape with houses and other buildings is visible on the distant shore, along with a small island featuring a white lighthouse and trees. A white delivery van is parked on a concrete area in the bottom-left foreground, and a seagull is visible on the concrete in the bottom-right.
